name: Crisp Fried Noodles and Chili Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the coriander and chili.
Dice the garlic clove.
Cut the peppers, carrot, onion, red pepper, and green pepper into fine strips.
2. Drain the mushrooms and corn.
Cut the onion into thin wedges.
3. Deep fry the Chinese vermicelli in hot oil until golden brown.
Drain on absorbent paper.
Place on a large serving plate and keep warm.
4. Heat 1/2 tsp Oil in a large pan.
Add the ginger, chopped coriander, and garlic.
Cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add onion, red pepper, green pepper, carrot to the pan.
Stir fry for 3 minutes.
6. Add the corn, mushrooms, soy sauce, vinegar, brown sugar, and chili paste.
7. Stir to combine and cook over high heat for an additional 3 minutes.
8. Spoon the vegetables over the noodles, pour any remaining sauce on top.
9. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve.
